entry.title: How can i able to add the LDAP user using BI REST API's through java code.
entry.content:
Hi, recently i had a requirement in my application where i need to provide the LDAP access for the users using java code.

can please help me if there is a way to add the user with Ldap alias by using SAP REST API's through java code.

entry.title: But in my laptop windows 11 I cannot find this service named sap cloud connect. how to find service?

entry.title: Hi Experts,I am getting error with Final settlement date error during CC migration
entry.content:
I am migrating single record through LTMC, to create condition contracts, I gave partial settlement date, delta settlement and final settlement dates also in the TLMC template, but still system gives me the below error. how can we over come this issue.

Thanks in Advance.

Rafiq khan

entry.title: Procurement of a Material Without a Material Master in SAP MM
entry.content:
Procurement of a Material Without a Material Master in SAP MM

In SAP Materials Management (MM), the material master plays a central role in procurement processes. However, there are situations where it may be necessary to procure a material without creating a material master record. This process is called procurement using non-material master items, and it is particularly useful for low-value, one-time purchases or services.

Below is an explanation of how this process works and the key considerations for implementing it in compliance with SAP Community Forum terms.

 

1. What Is Procurement Without a Material Master?

In standard procurement, material master data provides key information about the material, such as its description, unit of measure, and valuation. When procuring without a material master, these details are manually entered during the procurement process.

This method is often used for:

Consumables that do not justify creating a master record.

One-time purchases (e.g., office supplies).

Services or non-stock materials.

 

2. How It Works in SAP MM

To procure without a material master, follow these steps:

a. Create a Purchase Requisition (ME51N)

Open the transaction code ME51N (Create Purchase Requisition).

In the Item Overview section, enter the required details:

Short Text: Provide a description of the material or service.

Quantity: Specify the quantity needed.

Unit of Measure: Input the unit of measure (e.g., EA for each).

Material Group: Assign an appropriate material group to categorize the item.

Valuation Price: Enter the expected price of the material/service.

b. Convert to a Purchase Order (ME21N)

Use transaction code ME21N to create a purchase order.

Copy the purchase requisition into the purchase order.

Ensure the Account Assignment Category is set to identify the cost object (e.g., cost center, order, or project).

Review and finalize the data.

c. Goods Receipt and Invoice Verification

Use MIGO for goods receipt (if applicable).

Use MIRO for invoice verification.

 

3. Key Considerations

Account Assignment: Procurement without a material master always requires an account assignment (e.g., cost center or internal order) since the material cannot be stored in inventory.

Material Groups: Assigning the correct material group is essential for reporting and analytics.

Valuation and Control: Since no standard valuation exists, ensure the valuation price is realistic to avoid discrepancies during invoice verification.

Audit Compliance: Maintain detailed documentation for audit purposes, as this process bypasses standard material controls.

 

4. When to Avoid This Approach

While convenient, this approach should not be used for:

Frequently procured materials.

Materials requiring inventory tracking.

Scenarios where valuation and reporting accuracy are critical.

In such cases, creating a material master ensures better control and efficiency.

 

Procurement without a material master in SAP MM is a flexible option for one-time or low-value purchases. By understanding the process and its limitations, organizations can efficiently manage ad-hoc procurements while maintaining compliance with SAP standards and best practices.

SAP Community UI SAP GUI for Windows MM (Materials Management)

entry.title: Error closing phases - QE51N
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

When trying to close the phases in transaction QE51N, it displays the following error (SAP ECC):

"confirmations were recorded in the header of order"

What should I do?
Status in COR3: TECO MSPT CNF DLV PRC GMPS ILAS SETC
Status in QA03: INSP RREC PRII

entry.title: Delete Failed Queue
How can I change the 'Activity Start Time' in Tcode '/N/SAPAPO/SEQ1' by using BAPI.
entry.content:
I use a bapi '/SAPAPO/RRP_LC_ORDER_CHANGE' to change this 'Activity Start Time', but it does not return any error message and 'SY_SUBRC = 0'. 'Activity Start Time' have no any change. Tcode: '/N/SAPAPO/SEQ1' 

Please help me to check the following code:

DATA: iv_order      TYPE /sapapo/orderuid,
      gv_simversion TYPE /sapapo/vrsioid,
      gt_ordkey     TYPE /sapapo/om_ordkey_tab,
      gt_order      TYPE /sapapo/om_order_ext_tab,
      gt_activities TYPE /sapapo/om_tab_act,
      gs_ordkey     TYPE /sapapo/ordkey,
      gs_order      TYPE /sapapo/om_order_ext_str.

iv_order = 'kTy6E{AL7k{dc0zXuY8X6G'.
gv_simversion = '000'.

CALL FUNCTION '/SAPAPO/RRP_LC_ORDER_GET_DATA'
  EXPORTING
    iv_order      = iv_order
    iv_simversion = gv_simversion
  IMPORTING
    es_ordkey     = gs_ordkey
    et_ordkey     = gt_ordkey
    es_order      = gs_order
    et_order      = gt_order
    et_activities = gt_activities.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
  DATA: gv_method      TYPE /sapapo/om_method VALUE 'G',
        gv_application TYPE /sapapo/rrp_application VALUE 'I',
        ls_order       TYPE /sapapo/om_order,
        gt_rc          TYPE /sapapo/om_lc_rc_tab.
  DATA: iv_simid       TYPE /sapapo/vrsioid VALUE '000'.

  READ TABLE gt_activities ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_activities>)
  WITH KEY resid = '1oXmGQmT7k{9ZuMk6lKX6G'.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    <fs_activities>-startti = '20241230003104'.
  ENDIF.

  ls_order =  CORRESPONDING #( gs_order ).

  CALL FUNCTION '/SAPAPO/RRP_LC_ORDER_CHANGE'
    EXPORTING
      iv_method      = gv_method
      is_ordkey      = gs_ordkey
      it_activities  = gt_activities
      iv_application = gv_application
      iv_flush       = abap_true
    IMPORTING
      et_rc          = gt_rc
    EXCEPTIONS
      error_in_opr   = 1
      invalid_params = 2
      unknown_error  = 3
      OTHERS         = 4.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    CALL FUNCTION '/SAPAPO/SEQM_RRP_COMMIT'
      EXCEPTIONS
        commit_error = 1
        OTHERS       = 2.

    CALL FUNCTION 'RPM_FCODE_SAVE'
      EXPORTING
        iv_simid    = iv_simid
        iv_popup    = space
        iv_show_msg = space
      EXCEPTIONS
        fatal_error = 1
        other_error = 2
        OTHERS      = 3.

    COMMIT WORK AND WAIT .
    CALL FUNCTION '/SAPAPO/RRP_COMMIT'.
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Override first date for individual items in a sales order
entry.content:
Hi, 

How do you change the first date in a sales order. I did select the individual item and then Edit --> Fast change of --> Delivery date.  But that changed the Req. delivery date 

Thanks

entry.content:
Hello,

If the company has a subscription for the Integration Suite and wants to create a key on the process integration runtime for the plan (API). Then it will take cost or not?

entry.title: SOP in the SAP Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I cannot find the screens related to Sales Operational Planning / SOP in the SAP Public Cloud system. Can you support me?

Thanks..

entry.title: Random P-User selected during login to Community 2024 (I can't choose)
entry.content:
Hello,

This is an email I have just sent to sso@sap.com and community@sap.com. I post it in Community 2024 in case other people have the same issue.

When I log in to Notification feed - SAP Community every morning under my SAP Universal ID (primary email address: xxxxxxxxxxxxx@gmail.com), there’s no popup asking me under which account I want to login, it defaults to a linked P-User that I hadn’t use for days or months, it doesn’t select the last user I have used (S-User).

If I then go to Services & Support - SAP for Me, of course there’s an issue because the current account is a P-User instead of a S-User, so I have to log out and log in to Services & Support - SAP for Me, there’s a popup from which I can select my S-User.

If I log out, restart Edge, log in to Notification feed - SAP Community again, my P-User is selected again by default, instead of selecting the last used account (the S-user).

For information, the popup is also shown if I log in to SAP Developer Center | Official Resources for SAP Developers.

Is it possible to either select by default the last used account or let the user choose any of the linked accounts?

Workaround: I could unlink all my P-Users from my SAP Universal ID/secondary email address xxxxxxxxxxx@mycompany.com, but it’s the worst solution of course.

Steps to reproduce:

  1. Start Edge
  2. Start inPrivate window
  3. Login to https://community.sap.com/t5/notificationfeed/page
  4. Use of my SAP Universal ID primary email address: xxxxxxxxxxxx@gmail.com.
    Click Next.
  5. Type the password.
    Click Sign in.

  6.  

    PROBLEM: I cannot select which linked account I want to use; the Community page is shown, which means that one account was automatically selected (I don’t know which one).
  7. Login to https://me.sap.com/servicessupport/knowledge.
    PROBLEM: weird message “Due to inactivity…” Click “click here”.
  8. PROBLEM: click the user settings, you can see that a random P-User account was selected by the Community login.
  9. For information, here are my linked accounts (SAP Universal ID Account Manager😞

For comparison, I don’t have any issue if I first login via Services & Support - SAP for Me, I can select my account:

  1. Start Edge
  2. Start inPrivate window
  3. Login to https://me.sap.com/servicessupport/knowledge.
  4. Use of my SAP Universal ID primary email address: xxxxxxxxxxx@gmail.com.
    Click Next.
  5. Type the password.
    Click Sign in.
  6. GOOD, I can select the account I want:

  7. For information, if I now go to https://community.sap.com/t5/notificationfeed/page, it considers the current login correctly:

entry.title: Can we "Define Screen Layout at Document Level" in S4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
I want to change field selection for purchasing document type in s4hana public cloud.
But not able to find the configuration Define Screen Layout at Document Level in IMG.

entry.title: How can I drill down gl transaction detail in SAC?
entry.content:
Hi

Is it possible to view in SAC all the transactions posted to a gl for any point in time? As an example, I have the consulting gl for December for a particular cost center. I want to be able to view in SAC all the transaction that made up the total amount of consulting gl for December. This means that I want to see in SAC all the S4HANA data for this gl.
I have tried hyperlink but it does not work.

Anyone has any idea how this can be accomplished?

entry.title: Used FCH8 to void chk but vendor cashed check, how to reverse open invoices and void chk?
entry.content: I used FCH8 to void a check and this reopened the invoice, however, the vendor stated they did cash the check, and a reissue of payment is not needed. How do I reverse the void and open invoices?

entry.title: FieldValueProviderException: Failed to resolve values for item with PK: 8802941730817, by resolver:
entry.content:
HI All ,After upgrade to 2205 , getting below error while doing indexing : 

caused by: de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.config.exceptions.FieldValueProviderException: Failed to resolve values for item with PK: 8802941730817, by resolver: springELValueProvider, for property: voice, reason: EL1005E: Type cannot be found 'de.hybris.platform.core.model.product.ServicePlanModel'

For temporary fix ,we have added this properties in localproperties files : solrfacetsearch.fullSpELSupport=true,

but as per SAP it must be false .

Could anyone please suggest how to work on permanent fix for this issues ?

Thanks in advance.

SAP Community SAP Commerce Cloud SAP Help Portal

entry.title: sap mm learner
Issue: Data Not Displaying on CDS Endpoint Despite Presence in HANA Table
entry.content:
The Issue:

While working with SAP S/4HANA or SAP Cloud Platform, I encountered an issue where data in the HANA database table is not visible via the CDS endpoint, despite the data being present and accessible directly from the HANA table.


Here's a summary of the issue:

  • The data exists in the HANA table (Attached an image below).
  • A CDS view is defined to expose the data via an OData endpoint.
  • The OData service is properly registered, and the metadata is available.
  • However, when consuming the OData service, no data is returned, even though it should be.

 

 

Troubleshooting Steps We Tried:

Here are the troubleshooting steps we attempted to resolve the issue:

  1. Clearing Cache and Restarting Services
  2. Reviewing the CDS View Definition
  3. Verifying Service Registration
  4. Checking User Authorization

Investigating HANA CLI Query Results

Seeking Help from the SAP Community:

As I have encountered this issue in my own project, I would like to reach out to the SAP community for assistance. If anyone has experienced this problem or has insights on what might be causing this discrepancy, your input would be greatly appreciated.


I would love to hear from anyone in the SAP community who has encountered this issue before. Please share your insights, troubleshooting tips, or solutions to help resolve this issue. Your input will be invaluable in understanding and overcoming this challenge.

SAP Community

Node.js 

SAP HANA Cloud 

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP

entry.title: Can the field Location be selected correctly?
entry.content:

Can the field Locatin be selected correctly? or only SAP successfactors related location can be selected? I want to choose SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, but it failed....

entry.title: The selected SI fund is not valid for Unit.Arab Emir. employee
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I am trying to maintain IT3151 UAE insurance I am getting error as  The selected SI fund is not valid for Unit.Arab Emir. employee. I have created new fund type, I am getting the below error.

entry.title: Cannot see community.sap.com attached graphs
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

I am trying to see the entire content of the following blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-members/same-day-ach-how-to-set-up-your-sap-system-1-of-2/ba-p/13133409#:~:text=Same%2DDay%20ACH%20lessens%20outstanding,three%20settlement%20windows%20each%20day.

but only the text is shown, when I try to display/download the graphs, I receive the following error:

403. That’s an error.

Your client does not have permission to get URL /gsBIXI-VD6YqHD_U-DayhzGfP7YDwbuYgPGxp5w34Car4pbCmujKSSZFz7hN8A9XxfMp-xsrm94oVDMJhNeLT8zY-30tpWc7DJEr099My2OfObsxUVXoZ9xiByAybiUW3NoWcqM from this server. (Client IP address: 147.161.190.118)
ACL Denied That’s all we know.

Please help.

Regards, Armando
